title: Senior Revenue Manager at AirAsia India

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at AirAsia India
jsonLd.description:
AirAsia India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Raipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About AirAsia India:
AirAsia India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AirAsia India!
